description: Logs a message. Alias for studio.system.print .
Logs a warning. Alias for studio.system.warn .
Logs an error. Alias for studio.system.error .
Logs all members of object.
Logs a message in a popup dialog (blocking). Alias for studio.system.message .

returns: Returns either "mac" for Mac OS X or "win" for all Windows versions.
description: The current operating system of the computer. Returns either "mac" for Mac OS X or "win" for all Windows versions.
The absolute file path of the FMOD Studio process's executable.
An object containing version information for the Studio tool:
signature: { productVersion : [ number ], majorVersion : [ number ], minorVersion : [ number ], changelist : [ number ], }

returns: Returns true if the operation succeeds, or false otherwise.
description: Registers a menu item under the "Scripts" menu, based on the description object:
signature: { name : [ string ] ( required ), execute : [ function ] ( required ), keySequence : [ string ], isEnabled : [ bool ] ( dynamic ), isChecked : [ bool ] ( dynamic ), subMenuItems : [ array ( description )] ( dynamic ), }

returns: Returns true if the operation succeeds, or false otherwise.
description: Removes a menu item that was added with menu.addMenuItem() . The description argument must match a description that the menu item was added with.

returns: Returns an Array of menu item descriptions added with menu.
description: Returns an Array of menu item descriptions added with menu.addMenuItem() . The order of the Array matches the order in which the items were added.

returns: Returns true if the operation succeeds, or false otherwise.
description: Builds all the banks to all the platforms listed in the build tab of the preferences dialog.

Callback triggered when an audio file has finished being imported.

params.name: callback
params.doc: A callback function that will be called when an audio file import has completed.

description: Sets a function to be called when an audio file is imported, with the signature function(audioFile) .

Disconnects the connectFunction once it is no longer needed. It is important to disconnect the connected signals when they are no longer needed, otherwise they can accumulate and cause unexpected behavior.
A callback that will be fired when a build has completed.

params.name: callback
params.doc: A callback function that will be called when the build has ended.

description: Sets a function to be called after banks are built, with the signature function(success) . The success argument will be false if a build error occurs or the build is cancelled by the user, and true otherwise. For example:

Disconnects the connectFunction once it is no longer needed. It is important to disconnect the connected signals when they are no longer needed, otherwise they can accumulate and cause unexpected behavior.
signature: function connectToBuildEnd () { alert ( "Build about to end" ); } studio . project . buildEnded . connect ( connectToBuildEnd ); studio . project . buildEnded . disconnect ( connectToBuildEnd );

description: A callback that will be fired when a build has commenced.

params.name: callback
params.doc: A callback function that will be called when the build has started.

description: Sets a function to be called before banks are built, with the signature function() . For example:

Disconnects the connectFunction once it is no longer needed. It is important to disconnect the connected signals when they are no longer needed, otherwise they can accumulate and cause unexpected behavior.
The absolute path to the project's ".fspro` file on disk.
An enum corresponding to different distance attenuation roll-off types available to spatial effects.
signature: distanceRolloffType : { LinearSquared : 0 , Linear : 1 , Inverse : 2 , InverseTapered : 3 , Custom : 4 , }

description: An enum corresponding to different model.Parameter types available.
signature: parameterType : { Invalid : - 1 , User : 0 , UserDiscrete : 1 , UserEnumeration : 2 , Distance : 3 , Direction : 4 , Elevation : 5 , EventConeAngle : 6 , EventOrientation : 7 , Speed : 8 , SpeedAbsolute : 9 , DistanceNormalized : 10 }

description: An enum corresponding to different loop modes of a loop region.
A constant boolean value that is set to true if an object is the base class of another entity type.
A constant boolean value that is set to true if an entity exists globally, rather than on a per project basis.
A constant boolean value that is set to true if only a single ManagedObject instance of the entity can exist at any given time.

params.doc: Type of modulator to add. Must be RandomizerModulator , ADSRModulator , SidechainModulator or AutopitchModulator .

Sends the keyoff command to a currently playing event instance .
Moves the playback position to the cursor position if called while the event instance is playing, stopping, or paused, or to the start of the timeline while the event instance is stopped.

params.name: length
params.doc: The numerical duration of the new fade-in curve.

params.name: curveShape
params.doc: The numerical velocity of the curve. A value of 0 creates a linear fade-in, a positive value creates an accelerating fade-in, and a negative negative value creates a decelerating fade-in.

description: Sets the fade-in curve of the instrument to the specified length and curve shape.

params.name: length
params.doc: The numerical duration of the new fade-out curve.

params.name: curveShape
params.doc: The numerical velocity of the curve. A value of 0 creates a linear fade-out, a positive value creates an accelerating fade-out, and a negative negative value creates a decelerating fade-out.

description: Sets the fade-out curve of the instrument to the specified length and curve shape.

params.name: automatableObject
params.doc: Any model.AutomatableObject of the track such as a model.Sound , a model.MixerEffect , or the model.MixerBus of the track itself.

params.doc: The parameter sheet to add the sound to.

params.doc: The type of the model.Sound . Must be model.SingleSound , model.MultiSound , or model.ProgrammerSound .

params.doc: The numerical position of the new model.Sound . The value must be within the parameter 's range.

params.name: length
params.doc: The numerical length of the new model.Sound .

returns: Returns the model.
